message:
docs: add testimonial and update macOS app description

- Add Infoxicador testimonial about autonomous browser control
  - Clawdbot opened browser, navigated Google Cloud Console
  - Configured OAuth and provisioned API token autonomously
- Update macOS app section branding
  - Title: "Companion App (Beta)"
  - Subtitle: "Menubar access to your lobster. Works great alongside the CLI."

It’s the fact that clawd can just keep building upon itself just by talking to it in discord is crazy. The future is already here",

- Spinable local web server - No terminal needed — just download, open, and go. + Companion App (Beta) + Menubar access to your lobster. Works great alongside the CLI.
